chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ أُمَّهَاتِ الْأَوْلَادِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يُعْتِقُ إِحْدَاهُنَّ أَوْ يَمُوتُ عَنْهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 78 – Waiting period of the mothers of the children, and the man who emancipates one of them, or he dies from her

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْأَمَةِ يَمُوتُ سَيِّدُهَا قَالَ تَعْتَدُّ عِدَّةَ الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا قُلْتُ فَإِنَّ رَجُلًا تَزَوَّجَهَا قَبْلَ أَنْ تَنْقَضِيَ عِدَّتُهَا قَالَ يُفَارِقُهَا ثُمَّ يَتَزَوَّجُهَا نِكَاحاً جَدِيداً بَعْدَ انْقِضَاءِ عِدَّتِهَا قُلْتُ فَأَيْنَ مَا بَلَغَنَا عَنْ أَبِيكَ فِي الرَّجُلِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ الْمَرْأَةَ فِي عِدَّتِهَا لَمْ تَحِلَّ لَهُ أَبَداً قَالَ هَذَا جَاهِلٌ.

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan, from Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,

‘I asked Abu Ibrahim<sup>asws</sup> about the slave girl, her master died. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘She would observe the waiting period of the one widowed from her husband’. I said, ‘Supposing if a man were to marry her before she fulfils her waiting period?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They would both be separated, then he would have to marry her with a new marriage after the fulfillment of her waiting period’. I said, ‘So where would it be, what has reached us from your<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man when he marries the woman during her waiting period, she would not be Permissible for him, forever?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is an ignorant (one who reported it)’.
